_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Attack rate slightly decreased (148/hr vs 153/hr). 216.180.127.200 remains persistent top attacker (308 attempts, up from 220). 2.57.x.x subnet still has 2 IPs in top 5. 80.94.92.164 new in top 5 (144 attempts, replacing 185.156.73.233). Unique IPs increased to 2811 (from 2232). Crypto-related brute force campaign expanding: sol(495)+solana(389)+solv(118)+validator(47) = 1049 combined attempts. Root remains primary target (4325 of 7132 = 61%).

cgi_security.execute_cgi: Hardened - exact whitelist match only, rate limited, dangerous pattern blocking
cgi_security.terminal_cgi: Safe - case statement with hardcoded commands, argument sanitization
cgi_security.action_cgi: Safe - delegates to queue script with rate limiting
cgi_security.prompt_version_cgi: Safe - agent whitelist and hex-only hash validation
cgi_security.git_file_diff_py: Safe - path sanitization (blocks .. and /), subprocess with list args (no shell injection)
cgi_security.git_file_history_py: Safe - path sanitization (blocks .. and /), subprocess with list args (no shell injection)

known_issues: World-writable API files (action-queue.json, action-status.json, postmortems.json) - required for CGI, mitigated by whitelist validation
Git history contains pattern matches for secret-like keywords - audit confirms these are search patterns in scripts, not actual credentials
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. tasks.md intentionally served for task viewer. Any new .md file added to web root would be publicly accessible.
growth-hub.html uses innerHTML with template literals but has 0 escapeHtml calls - data is all internal JSON, not user input. Low risk but lacks defense-in-depth.
notes: Full security review completed - 20 checks passed, no new vulnerabilities
6 HTML files modified since last review (security-center, analytics-hub, index, config-center, communications-hub, growth-hub) - related to TASK-288/289 page merges
Modified pages reviewed: no eval(), innerHTML uses template literals with JSON data, escapeHtml used in security-center(38), config-center(29), communications-hub(15), analytics-hub(8), index(3)
Deleted pages confirmed returning 404: alerting-hub.html, time-explorer.html
Merged pages confirmed serving 200: security-center.html, analytics-hub.html
No CGI scripts modified since last review - all 6 remain secure
SSH attack rate slightly decreased: 148/hr (down from 153/hr), but unique IPs up to 2811 (from 2232)
Crypto brute force campaign expanding: sol+solana+solv+validator = 1049 combined attempts (up from 635 sol+solana last review)
recommendations: CRITICAL: Install fail2ban for SSH protection - consistent ~148/hr brute force from 2811 unique IPs
Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for tasks.md (defense in depth)
Enable UFW firewall to restrict unnecessary ports
Consider adding escapeHtml to growth-hub.html for defense-in-depth (currently 0 calls)
